sqlMap:
<<<<<<< HEAD
SELECT taskID, parentID, ownerID, creatorID, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorName else creatorName2 end as creatorName, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskStatus, completeRate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(completeDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as completeDate, importance, hasShare, hasAttach, hasComment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startDate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(endDate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as endDate, repetition, repetitionDelete, repetitionStatus, title, contentPath, taskType, updateTime, newAnswer, newRefer, personID, personName, personName2, case when #primary# = 1 then personDeptName else personDeptName2 end as personDeptName, personAttach, personContentPath taskPersonID, case when #primary# = 1 then taskPersonName else taskPersonName2 end as taskPersonName FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
=======
SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #memberID#
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, autodelete, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #autoDelete#, #tenantID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, autodelete = #autoDelete# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
>>>>>>> cdf7d517b3b4ffb5fd16871f91735d19d1302e9c
